channel.title: Blog on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Home

item.title: Random Stories
item.description: I was given a google mini home, so I named some of my devices like: Bedroom light’s name is Banana 🍌 So I can say “Hey Google, turn on Banana” My diffuser’s name is Pinky I just added a command to my Google home. Me: “Hey Google, who is the most beautiful girl in the world ?” Google: “She is Tien” 😁

item.title: Tips
item.description: In Python, it’s a good practice to typecast categorical features to a category dtype because they make the operations on such columns much faster than the object dtype. Preprocessing multiple dtypes: want to use all of our data in a single pipeline. Problem : Pipeline steps for numeric and text processing can’r follow each other. Eg : We can’t just have a Pipeline that has a CountVectorizer step, Imputation step, and then a classifier.

item.title: Wanna see my DIY?
item.description: This is where I will show all of the things I’ve made or designed since I came to U.S. The wallet I got a lot of compliments. The chair After spending money buy a desk, I used its box and a duck tap to make a chair. Luckily, it lasts all year. The makeup organizer My little corner My desk @ Tesla
